data.body: Rebase conflict recovered: rebasing work-8d8e onto #664 PS9 tried to replay old PS8 commit (not patch-identical) -> conflict. Fixed with git rebase --onto work-4214 4b601fa38 (drop old PS8, replay only 8d8e). Stack: main <- #664 PS9 (58c20599) <- 8d8e (54412934f). Pushed #664 PS9 + #685 PS2. PS9 strengthened 2 tests (assert 'mismatch' verdict + positive authoritative-material counterpart; assert 'key_not_valid_at_era'). Pre-checking 4214 completion-verifier locally before waiting for CI.
